title: Jorad Pressor

{{Quote|Good day. My name is Guardian Pressor. You're in a turbolift car that is being held in suspension between two opposing repulsor beams. Do you understand this?|Jorad Pressor|<ref name="SQ" />}}
'''Jorad Pressor''' was a survivor of the [[Outbound Flight Project]]. Unknown to him, his family was selected because his father, [[Dillian Pressor]], had a [[Secondary|glimmer]] of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitivity]] and his descendants may have had [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] potential. He was the brother of [[Katarin Pressor]] and [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Let's make this simple, Ambassador. First of all, I don't trust you. Any of you. You arrive suddenly and without warning, invading my ship without even attempting to communicate with us first.|Jorad Pressor|<ref name="SQ" />}}
Jorad's [[Parent/Legends|father]] [[Dillian Pressor]] was [[Secondary|weakly Force-sensitive]]. Jorad was four years old during the events of ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.<ref name="OF" />

While on board ''Outbound Flight'', the young Jorad formed a friendship with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lorana Jinzler]], calling her Jedi Lorana since he didn't know how to pronounce Jinzler. It was one of the reasons he didn't kill her brother, [[Dean Jinzler]] when he was caught in the trap that was set by the [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|Survivors]]. He even hoped to become a Jedi but his force-potential wasn't enough. Later, when the vessel crashed into the unnamed planet in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], Pressor and his family were safe in the supply core along with other survivors. They then formed a self-sufficient colony, and Pressor eventually became the [[Guardian of the People|Guardian]] of the colony, helping to protect them from intruders.<ref name="SQ" />

In the year [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Jorad served as the guardian of the colony and used his Force-sensitive niece [[Evlyn Tabory]] in his duties, and helped his sister cover up her child's [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Jedi potential]] to avoid having her being exiled to ''[[Dreadnaught-Three]]''. After the events with [[Jorus C'baoth]], Jorad held strong dislike for the Jedi and did everything they could to hide Evlyn's special abilities. With the arrival of some strangers at the remains of the Flight project, Jorad again used his niece against the newcomers to successfully lure them into a trap. He thus held the strangers trapped in the [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolifts]], and only their alleged [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] with his companions were allowed to accompany Jorad back to the colony.<ref name="SQ" />

Meanwhile, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] managed to escape from an Imperial prison and journeyed to the Redoubt, where they encountered the Outbound Colony.<ref name="SQ" />

The colonists, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] and the [[Empire of the Hand]], were soon thereafter attacked by the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]], who had originally presented themselves as [[Geroon (species)|Geroons]], in order to avenge their defeat and humiliation during the [[Battle of the Redoubt]].<ref name="SQ" />

Eventually, Jorad and the other colonists were evacuated to the [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="SQ" />
